common.comingSoonBody: This screen is on the way.

onboarding.title:
A few things to know
about Sava
onboarding.p1d: Your money isn't a deposit and isn't covered by any bank guarantee scheme.
onboarding.p2d: Yield changes daily with the market. It is never fixed and never guaranteed.
onboarding.p3d: You could get back less than you put in. Sava is non-custodial — your keys stay with you.
onboarding.ack1: I understand Sava is not a bank and my funds are not guaranteed.
onboarding.ack2: I understand the rate is variable and I could lose money.
onboarding.reacceptBody: We've updated our Terms of Use. Please review and accept the new version to continue.

auth.title:
Sign in or create
your account
auth.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll set everything up, including your wallet, automatically.
auth.legal: By continuing you accept our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.netError: Connection problem. Check your network and try again.

otp.title: Enter the 6-digit code
otp.error: That code isn't right. Check and re-enter.

provisioning.title: Setting up your account
provisioning.note: This takes a few seconds. Your keys are generated on your device.
provisioning.failedNote: Something interrupted setup. Your funds are safe — tap to try again.

home.title: You're signed in
home.subtitle: Your wallet is ready. The Home screen lands with the app shell.
home.errBody: We couldn't reach the network. Pull to refresh or try again.
home.pausedTitle: Activity paused — your funds are safe
home.pausedBody: New supplies are paused while the pool is reviewed. Your supplied USDC and balance are unaffected, and withdrawals stay open.

addFunds.title: Add funds
addFunds.sub: Choose how you'd like to add USDC.
addFunds.cardDesc: Buy USDC with your bank card via Mercuryo
addFunds.recvDesc: Deposit USDC from another Stellar wallet

addLira.title: Pay with card
addLira.kycTitle: ID check required for this amount
addLira.kycBody: Orders over €699 need a quick identity check by Mercuryo. You'll do it on the next step.
addLira.buying: You're buying USDC on the Stellar network — held in your own wallet, not by Sava.
addLira.partner: Card payment & ID checks handled by Mercuryo, a licensed EU payment partner.

mercuryo.title: Payment
mercuryo.embeddedDesc: Mercuryo's hosted payment UI loads here. Card details, 3-D Secure and identity checks are handled entirely by Mercuryo — Sava never sees card data.
mercuryo.fallback: The Mercuryo widget couldn't load here yet — it needs your sandbox access (widget id + IP allowlist). Use the demo button below to test the flow.

order.title: Your order
order.paidBody: Mercuryo has your payment. We're converting it to USDC on the Stellar network.
order.settlingBody: Your USDC is settling on Stellar. This usually takes under a minute.
order.arrivedBody: Your USDC is in your wallet, ready to supply and earn.
order.failedBody: Your card wasn't charged, or the charge was reversed. No USDC was bought.
order.timeoutTitle: This is taking longer than usual
order.timeoutBody: Your payment is confirmed but settlement is delayed. Funds are safe; this can take a few more minutes.

receive.title: Deposit USDC
receive.warnLead: You'll receive USDC into your own Stellar wallet. These transfers are final, so please confirm the details below.
receive.w1Body: This address accepts USDC. Any other asset sent here cannot be credited or recovered.
receive.w2Body: The sender must select the Stellar network. Transfers sent via Ethereum, Tron, BSC or others cannot be recovered.
receive.w3Body: On-chain transfers cannot be reversed. If funds are sent incorrectly, neither Sava nor anyone else can recover them.
receive.ack: I confirm I will only receive USDC on the Stellar network.
receive.memoNote: No memo needed for this account — your address alone is enough.

send.title: Withdraw USDC
send.invalid: Enter a valid Stellar address (starts with G, 56 characters)
send.failed: Couldn't send. Check the address and your balance, then try again.
send.netNote: Sent as USDC on the Stellar network. Only use a Stellar address that accepts USDC, or your funds could be lost.
send.offramp: Cashing out to lira? Send to your exchange's USDC receive address (e.g. Binance TR), then sell for lira there.
send.successBody: Your USDC is on its way on the Stellar network. It usually arrives in under a minute.
send.scanHint: Line up the recipient's Stellar QR code

settings.title: Settings
settings.walletWhatBody: This is your Stellar wallet address — like an account number on the Stellar network. You can safely share it to receive USDC. Sava never holds your keys.
settings.signOutBody: Your funds stay safe on-chain. You'll need your email to sign back in.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: No connection. Check your internet and try again.
errors.invalidCode: That code is invalid or expired.

risk.notABank: Sava is not a bank. Yields are variable and not guaranteed.
